notes: Target state for Google Business Profile (Maps) — apply in GBP UI or via official Business Profile API after OAuth. This file is not sent to Google automatically.

onlineAppointments.implementationHint: Yes — link to https://resumora.net/contact (or live booking URL). Match primary CTA on site.

onlineEstimates.implementationHint: Yes — scoped quotes aligned with /pricing; avoid unbounded promises.

virtualOrRemoteServices.implementationHint: Yes — primary delivery is remote; service area: online / worldwide plus any real local areas.

appointmentRequired.implementationHint: Yes — concierge intake; avoids walk-in mismatch with studio positioning.

multilingualSupport.implementationHint: Enable multilingual + EN/FR explicitly where GBP allows both.

frenchSupport.implementationHint: List French; align with bilingual solution pages on resumora.net.

professionalResumeConsulting.implementationHint: Categories + services: resume writer / career counselor taxonomy closest to region; services mirror /services + /solutions/*.

careerCoachingRelevance.implementationHint: Include career coaching where offered (e.g. /solutions/career-coaching); do not over-claim outside scope.

globalOnlineServiceOptimization.implementationHint: Service area: worldwide/online; hours accurate; website UTM optional: ?utm_source=gmb&utm_medium=organic

aiSeoDiscoverability.implementationHint: Site: JSON-LD Organization/WebSite + factual GBP description; GSC sitemap; no keyword stuffing.

trustAndAuthority.implementationHint: Reviews + owner replies; photos; Q&A; consistent NAP with site footer; no duplicate listings.

primaryCategories.notes: Pick closest GBP taxonomy per region; avoid unrelated categories for E-E-A-T.

serviceArea.notes: If you also serve a city, add without removing online positioning.

liveSiteAlignment.notes: Used by npm run resumora:gbp:audit — heuristic only; extend list cautiously.

crossChannelConsistency.descriptionAlignment: Premium, ATS-safe, bilingual EN/FR, concierge — factual; no medical/legal claims.
crossChannelConsistency.socialBios: NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCIAL_* and NEXT_PUBLIC_ORG_SAME_AS must match GBP social links where offered.

gbpHints: Service area: worldwide or multi-region you truly serve
Posts alternate EN/FR captions where policy allows

antiLeak.storeIn: Render/Railway environment or Google Secret Manager only
